## [Note]

dbbot v0.1.0 is the first official release after v0.0.1 and consolidates the MySQL fixes validated during the v0.1.0-beta.1 regression run.

## [Change]

- Clarify that the shipped sample MySQL inventory addresses are RFC 5737 documentation examples rather than deployment defaults.
- Rename the unsafe MySQL uninstall play so the entrypoint wording matches its real destructive purpose.

## [Fix]

- Respect `mysql_packages_dir` during the MySQL package existence pre-check so custom local package directories work correctly.
- Probe configured yum repositories before attempting `jemalloc` installation and fall back cleanly to the bundled RPM on minimal hosts where the package is unavailable.
- Add repository coverage for the custom `mysql_packages_dir` regression path to prevent the package pre-check behavior from regressing again.
